subject: A jacket floating without a wearer, energized with blue crackling magic
description: A windbreaker jacket hovers in mid-air with no visible wearer inside it, arms extended outward as if animated. Bright blue energy crackles along its seams and cuffs, glowing against a foggy, industrial backdrop. The surrounding environment shows tall tower-like structures and what appear to be lanterns or light fixtures suspended in the mist. The jacket is dark-colored with white or pale sleeves, and the blue energy dominates the center of the composition.
foreground: Animated jacket floating with arms outstretched, blue energy along seams
emotion: unnerving animation; the garment moves with intent but has no body
